problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
